violations.text: A dish scrubber and discarded paper towel were observed in the kitchen hand-washing sink, a pitcher was observed hanging on the sink. A hand-washing sink must not be used for purposes other than hand washing. PIC took pitcher to be cleaned and sanitized and discarded the paper towel and scrubber. Corrected On-Site. New Violation. Correct By: 09/04/2025

The consumer advisory provided does not disclose the foods on the menu that are raw or undercooked. PIC stated they are working to have necessary pages reprinted. New Violation. Correct By: 09/08/2025
Rice was observed cooling in the storage area. PIC had staff relocate pan. Corrected On-Site. New Violation. Correct By: 09/04/2025
Refrigerator door gaskets were observed in poor repair. PIC stated parts have been ordered. New Violation. Correct By: 09/29/2025

The pre-flush spray hose at the 3-bay sink is hanging below the flood rim. A plumbing system shall be installed to prevent backflow of a liquid or gas contaminant into the water supply by providing an air gap or installing an approved backflow prevention device. New Violation. Correct By: 09/08/2025

Food contact surfaces of equipment/utensils (ice machine) were observed with an accumulation of food and debris. The food contact surfaces of equipment must be clean to sight and touch. Ice machine was taken out of service to be cleaned and sanitized. Ice disposed. Corrected On-Site. New Violation. Correct By: 08/25/2025

Chicken and salsa were observed held at 127 degrees Fahrenheit. Time/temperature control for safety (TCS) food must be maintained at 135 degrees Fahrenheit or above except during preparation, cooking, or cooling. Foods were reheated; steam table temperature was adjusted. Corrected On-Site. New Violation. Correct By: 08/25/2025

Salsa was observed held at 45 degrees Fahrenheit on ice in the guac station. Time/temperature control for safety (TCS) food must be held at 41 degrees Fahrenheit or below except during preparation, cooking, or cooling. PIC added ice and water to unit to maintain temperature. Corrected On-Site. New Violation. Correct By: 08/25/2025
The consumer advisory provided does not disclose the foods on the menu that are raw or undercooked. New Violation. Correct By: 09/08/2025

Establishment was using an unapproved area for food preparation (storeroom, under waste lines). PIC had staff move to a protected table near the ware washing area. Corrected On-Site. New Violation. Correct By: 08/25/2025
Cases of food/beverage were observed stored on the floor in the storage areas. Food must be stored at least 6 inches above the floor. New Violation. Correct By: 08/25/2025

Bowls are being used as scoops in containers of sauce and rice. Utensils used to dispense non-time/temperature control for safety (TCS) foods such as sugar and flour must be stored in the food item with their handles above the top of the food within the container. PIC removed bowls and informed staff to cease practice. Corrected On-Site. New Violation. Correct By: 08/25/2025
Refrigerator door gaskets were observed in poor repair. New Violation. Correct By: 09/29/2025

The pre-flush spray hose at the 3-bay sink is hanging below the flood rim. A plumbing system shall be installed to prevent backflow of a liquid or gas contaminant into the water supply by providing an air gap or installing an approved backflow prevention device. New Violation. Correct By: 09/08/2025
